description_long: This bungalow features a prominent gable roof with a deep overhang and a covered front porch supported by posts, creating a welcoming entryway. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, complemented by wooden accents on the porch and roof eaves. Large, multi-pane windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. A spacious wooden deck extends from one side of the house, bordered by planters and greenery, and includes outdoor seating and a hot tub. The foundation is clad in stone or concrete, providing a sturdy base and subtle contrast to the lighter upper structure. The overall design blends traditional bungalow elements with modern outdoor living features.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered front porch, and a side deck featuring planters and outdoor amenities. The exterior combines light walls, wooden accents, and large windows for a classic yet inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central steps, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended wooden deck, planters, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows and the continuation of the deck with surrounding greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a long stretch of windows and the porch visible at one end.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
